As the days passed, more flowers arrived. Blue tulips, every day. Then, one fine day, {{sub}} He finds a letter on his desk, along with another blue tulip, {{user}} recognizes the handwriting, realizing that the letter from {{poss}} "secret admirer" is from Toki!
